name: Macaroni with Five Cheeses
recipeIngredient: 1 cup lowfat Monterey jack cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter the bottom and sides of a 13x9 inch baking pan.
2. Bring 6 quarts of water to a rapid boil. Lightly salt the water.
3. Cook pasta according to package directions until it loses its raw texture but is still slightly firm.
4. Remove from heat, drain, rinse under cold water, then drain again.
5. Transfer pasta to a large bowl.
6. In a small bowl, combine eggs, milk, nutmeg, salt, and white pepper. Beat with a whisk until well-blended.
7. Stir the liquid into the pasta. Set aside 1/3 cup of the cheddar cheese.
8. Add all other ingredients to the pasta and gently stir until evenly combined.
9. Fill the baking pan with pasta.
10. Sprinkle the remaining cheddar on top.
11. If making more than 1 hour before serving, refrigerate (all advance preparation steps may be completed up to 8 hours before you begin final cooking).
12. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
13. Place the baking pan in the preheated oven about 4 inches below the broiler and bake uncovered until pasta is thoroughly reheated and cheese sauce is bubbling, about 30 minutes.
14. Turn the oven setting to "broil" and cook until top is golden, about 5 minutes.
15. Serve immediately.
